positive: A stylized, abstract depiction of a majestic bioluminescent forest clearing at twilight. The central subject is a cluster of oversized, stylized glowing flora (mushrooms, ferns, vines) radiating soft, contrasting cool tones (electric blue, neon green) against a deep, velvety indigo and midnight purple background. The composition should be symmetrical and centered, emphasizing clean, crisp outlines and vibrant silhouettes. Use an ethereal, minimalist vector art style combined with the texture of digital ink wash. Perfect for screen printing on apparel. High contrast, dramatic backlighting, volumetric light rays, deep depth of field.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, low resolution, poorly rendered, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noisy, grain, jpeg artifacts, faded, realistic photo, writing
